Faction.name: {=str_clan_name_druchii_2}House of Karond Kar
Faction.text: {=str_clan_desc_druchii_2}The Slaver Gate of Naggaroth, Karond Kar is a city of despair where the captives of a hundred raids are brought to be broken.

Faction.name: {=str_clan_name_druchii_3}House of Hag Graef
Faction.text: {=str_clan_desc_druchii_3}The Dark Crag, Hag Graef is the most dreaded of cities, built in a sunless chasm and ruled by the cruelest of Dreadlords.
